task.title: WebSocket Real-time Updates
task.description: Implement WebSocket endpoint for real-time notification status updates

implementation.details:
1. Add WebSocket support to Axum
2. Implement /api/v1/ws endpoint with authentication
3. Subscribe to Redis pub/sub for updates
4. Handle WebSocket connection lifecycle
5. Add connection metrics and limits

task.acceptance_criteria: WebSocket connections established, receives real-time updates when notifications change status, handles client disconnections
